# Deploy workflow migration — carkedit-online

The three workflows in `.github/workflows/` now call the unified `carkedit-deploy`
service (Bearer-auth) instead of the legacy `*.php` webhook endpoints. The migration
shipped in PR `dev/gh-actions-rewrite`.

## GitHub Actions secrets required

Three new repo-level secrets must be set in **Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions**
before the next push exercises a workflow. Without them, the deploy step fails with
`HTTP 401`.

| Secret name | Used by | Server-side source |
|---|---|---|
| `DEPLOY_TOKEN_DEV_CLIENT` | `deploy.yml` (branch push) | `/home/bitnami/server/.deploy-token-carkedit-online` on the **dev** box |
| `DEPLOY_TOKEN_STAGING_CLIENT` | `deploy-staging.yml` (tag `vs*`) | `.deploy-token-carkedit-online` on the **staging** box |
| `DEPLOY_TOKEN_PROD_CLIENT` | `deploy-production.yml` (tag `v[0-9]*`) | `.deploy-token-carkedit-online` on the **prod** box |

Each token is a 64-char hex string generated by carkedit-deploy on first boot
(`openssl rand -hex 32`). The plaintext is also retrievable via
`GET /api/admin/deploy-token` on the matching box (admin-authenticated).

## Legacy secrets

The pre-migration secrets — `DEPLOY_TOKEN_DEV`, `DEPLOY_TOKEN_STAGING`,
`DEPLOY_TOKEN_PROD` — are retained for one transition cycle in case rollback is
needed via `git revert`. They are scheduled for deletion in **Phase 7** of the
carkedit-deploy rollout. Don't reuse the names.

## Endpoint reference

| Workflow | Trigger | Endpoint |
|---|---|---|
| `deploy.yml` | branch push (`**`) | `POST https://dev.play.carkedit.com/api/admin/deploy/api/client?branch=<ref>` |
| `deploy-staging.yml` | tag push (`vs*`) | `POST https://staging.play.carkedit.com/api/admin/deploy/api/client?tag=<ref>` |
| `deploy-production.yml` | tag push (`v[0-9]*`) | `POST https://play.carkedit.com/api/admin/deploy/api/client?tag=<ref>` |

Full spec: `carkedit-deploy/PLAN-deploy-implementation.md` §8.
